title: Custom Music Disc – Sinta a Pressão (Loud Meme Remix)
description: Custom music disc replacing "13" with a distorted remix. Client-side only, 1.20.1–1.21.8.
body:
**Custom Music Disc – Meme Remix Edition**

This resource pack replaces the Minecraft disc **"13"** with a custom LOUD remix of a meme song known as *"Sinta a Pressão Neném"*.  
It’s heavily distorted and amplified as a parody and internet joke.

---

⚠️ **WARNING – EXTREMELY LOUD SOUND** ⚠️  
- Set your **Minecraft volume to 10% or lower** before playing  
- **Do not use headphones**  
- This disc is meant for **joke use only**, not for serious gameplay  
- You have been warned 

---
 **Features:**
- Replaces `music_disc_13`
- Fully client-side – no mods needed
- Works with Minecraft **1.20.1 to 1.21.8**
- Includes custom texture, model, and `.ogg` audio

---

**Legal & Usage:**
This remix was created as a non-commercial, heavily edited parody.  
It is NOT intended to infringe on any copyrights and is used under fair use/remix context.  
Please do not redistribute without credit.

---

Made with love by a fellow chaotic soul
